basics.name: Tiago Rocha Gonçalves
basics.label: R&D Engineer
basics.summary: PhD in Computer Science from CentraleSupélec with a strong focus on AI-driven decision-making and reinforcement learning. Extensive experience developing and deploying machine learning solutions, including reinforcement learning for planning and optimization tasks.

work.name: Valeo
work.summary: Member of the ASTRA team, a joint Inria–Valeo research team focused on intelligent transportation systems and automated driving.

work.name: Inria
work.summary: R&D engineer in the RITS team (now ASTRA), working on deep reinforcement learning for autonomous vehicle decision-making and planning.

work.name: National Institute for Space Research (INPE)
work.summary: Development of a LabVIEW programme capable of tracking satellites.

volunteer.summary: Organisation of a career fair for doctoral and post-doctoral students at the Université Paris-Saclay.
Teaching English to local disadvantaged communities in Campinas, Brazil.

courses: Thesis: Robust control of platooning systems over imperfect wireless channels
Designed a reinforcement learning framework that improved platoon fuel efficiency by 7%.
Developed a Simulink/Matlab-based platooning simulation environment with integrated ADAS (CC, ACC, CACC) and V2X (802.11p) communication systems.
Focus: Optimal control, numerical methods, and stochastic systems.

education.institution: Federal University of Rio Grande do Norte (UFRN)
courses: Exchange programme at Lakehead University, Canada (18 months).

awards.title: Valedictorian
awards.awarder: Federal University of Rio Grande do Norte (UFRN)
awards.summary: Graduated rank 1 out of 60+ students in Electrical Engineering.

Patents.name: Method used in an electronic system — driving safety score
Patents.description: Patent FR2409960 — Method used in an electronic system, system for determining a driving safety score for a vehicle.

Patents.name: Method for controlling the movement of a vehicle
Patents.description: Patent FR2412803 — Method for controlling the movement of a vehicle and associated system.
